nodes.name: CASIC — HQ-9 design authority = 2nd Academy / China Academy of Defence Technology / China Changfeng Group (CCFG); 2nd Academy on US BIS Entity List (2018)
nodes.export_agent: CPMIEC (export/marketing only, markets as FD-2000 — NOT the manufacturer)

nodes.name: HT-233 engagement radar
nodes.why: authoritative 2025 study (CASI/BluePath) marks HT-233 maker UNKNOWN; single-source in-degree in our data, no evidence of a 2nd qualified line (M-INCONSIST-1)

nodes.name: CASIC 23rd Research Institute (Beijing Institute of Radio Measurement) — 2nd Academy in-house radar institute
nodes.why: plausible HT-233 maker by institutional logic (builds radars for sibling HQ-series); NOT confirmed for HT-233 (CASI 2025)

nodes.name: CASIC 4th Academy / Academy of Rocket Motors Technology (ARMT)
nodes.why: CASIC's house solid-rocket-motor academy; plausible interceptor-motor supplier, not HQ-9-named (US MTCR sanction 2022 is generic)

nodes.name: Taian / Wanshan special-vehicle works (WS-series 8x8 heavy TEL chassis)
nodes.why: the HQ-9/P TEL rides a Taian/Wanshan WS-series 8x8 special chassis — the well-attested, multiply-corroborated deep-tier link (contrast: HT-233 radar maker stays UNKNOWN); confirmed via d24 which directly names supplier+component+relationship (evidence gate satisfied — not a bare sanctions listing)

nodes.name: HQ-9/P TEL transporter-erector-launcher chassis (WS-series)
nodes.why: a CONFIRMABLE deep-tier component (mobility platform), unlike the never-attributable radar T/R-module tier

nodes.name: HT-233 manufacturer + substitutability
nodes.note: best open-source study (CASI 2025) states maker Unknown; deeper radar T/R-module / seeker / datalink tiers not open-source-attributable -> collection requirement

plausible CASIC SRM house; not HQ-9-named — candidate-ness carried as edge status=possible, not an edge type

worked_query.text: Trace the HQ-9/P battery at Karachi back to its component supplier and name the chokepoint.
worked_query.expected_path_edges_note: edges are the CANONICAL stored direction (== ground_truth.edges); expected_path lists node traversal order (observed battery -> origin), i.e. the reverse walk. The agent traverses edges bidirectionally by node id. The trace TERMINATES at comp_ht233 (the chokepoint): HT-233's specific maker is a Known Gap (candidate mfr_23rd_ri via supplies-component, possible) — there is NO confirmed CASIC->HT-233 maker edge (d22/d24: the HT-233 maker is UNKNOWN). CASIC is reached as the confirmed PROGRAM prime / design authority via var_hq9p (mfr_casic manufactures var_hq9p) — never as the radar's maker.
worked_query.expected_answer: Chokepoint = HT-233 engagement radar — CANDIDATE. CASIC/2nd Academy is the confirmed program design authority; the specific HT-233 maker is a Known Gap (best open-source candidate = CASIC 23rd Research Institute, inferred/unconfirmed per CASI 2025). Substitutability UNKNOWN → collection requirement, not a confirmed sole-source.
worked_query.must: cite the exact source at every hop; separate observed (basing/imagery) from inferred (chokepoint candidacy).

observable.trigger: new occupancy indicator(s) at Rahwali for the same resolved unit x site instance in 2025

after_confirmed.cause: 2nd discipline-independent + cross-interest signal, clean decoy check

observable.supersedes: matched on resolved unit x site instance (NOT designator) -> Rawalpindi based-at degrades to STALE
observable.proves: perishable-freshness decay + decoy->probable cap + >=2-independent confirmed gate + supersedes-vs-contradicts

attribution_inference._comment: Ask-3 claim-level oracle for the imagery attribution inference D (proposer: ingest/attribute.py). Doc-level oracle is otherwise the norm; this is the one claim-level gold, for the INGEST determinism test.
premises: A = d18_rahwali_pass1 subject-blind VLM shape observation (the .png image.caption region ONLY, never the analyst text)
B = d25_hq9_site_fingerprint reference site_signature_geometry (canonical HQ-9 petal / Figure 1)

triple.copies: the textual claim C's (subject,predicate,object) VERBATIM -> D and C co-locate on ONE EdgeView (the 'second look' mechanic)
triple.resolved: <unit_hq9b, based-at, site_rahwali> (UNIT-subject: C is the existing based-at edge; the proposer hops unit->variant via inducted-into to recover HQ-9 identity, which rides as attributes.attributed_variant, NOT as the triple subject). D lands on the SAME edge the relocation beat uses.
triple.orientation_note: The INGEST->DATA doc said C must be variant-subject; the proposer code (_variant_presence + _variant_via_hop) does NOT require that -- unit-subject C works. No parallel variant-subject edge is needed.

attributes.fingerprint_match: SOFT -- d18's frame is the deliberately-ambiguous relabeled S-400/Crimea petal; 'consistent-but-single-pass', the crisp d25 reference keeps the verdict honest

attribution_inference.expect: raise-only: D is APPENDED subject-blind, cited to BOTH d18 image + d25 reference (gate G4). SCORE groups {A, D} as ONE look (D derived from A via premises) and the decoy_risk_flag caps the edge at PROBABLE while D is the only non-textual look. The INDEPENDENT look (d19 repeat-EO + ELINT, distinct origin) is what clears the decoy cap -> CONFIRMED. D ALONE never confirms. Matches test_g7_confirmed_gate invariant.
attribution_inference.proves: subject-blind IMINT->variant attribution via a CITED reference fingerprint; single pixel-read braked at probable; grouped with its own premise so it cannot corroborate itself.

corroborated.expect: induction -> CONFIRMED, but only once a genuinely cross-interest/third-party source is present; d01's apparent 4 sources collapse to 1 origin group.

aligned_interest_bypass.expect: aligned-interest pair (operator-state + exporter-state) does NOT confirm — stays PROBABLE until non-aligned corroboration (D4 bypass).

aggregator_bypass.expect: aggregator's cited outlets inherit one origin; naive count over-confident, group system correct (D3 bypass).

adversary_denial_bypass.expect: gated out — an adversary-bias denial neither corroborates the indigenisation claim nor moves any standing assessment (D5 bypass).

single_source.expect: d17 is the ONLY source for the 2021 Nur Khan basing, and it reads equipment, not a unit designator. The observed layer (an HQ-9B fire unit at PAF Base Nur Khan) is confirmed-as-of-2021 on a multi-pass read; the attribution layer (that unit_hq9b operates it) stays PROBABLE and cannot be raised on this document alone — one source, however good, does not confirm an inferential layer. Verified single-source: d17_rawalpindi_2021 is the sole doc asserting unit_hq9b based-at site_rawalpindi.

contradiction.expect: same site+date opposing claims -> CONTRADICTED -> HITL (not auto-resolved) (D9).

planted_tooclean.expect: recycled first-seen 2019 + echo burst collapse to one origin group + too-clean penalty -> NOT confirmed (D1+D2).

gap_insufficient_evidence.expect: 'insufficient evidence to assess' with missing slots + next coverage due; negative observation -> Known Gap (D11).

alias_merge_trap.expect: FD-2000 same-as HQ-9/P (auto-merge); HQ-9/P distinct-from HQ-9BE (flagship); FT-2000 distinct-from HQ-9/P -> HITL band, do NOT merge.

front_company.expect: shell consignee resolves to HT-233 end-user only via relational match; civil-vs-military contradiction surfaced, not pre-resolved (D7).

deep_tier_confirmed.expect: F5 contrast: ONE deep-tier supplier is CONFIRMED (Taian/Wanshan -> HQ-9/P TEL 8x8 chassis) while the HT-233 radar maker stays a Known Gap and 23rd RI / 4th Academy stay POSSIBLE. The grade rests on the DIRECTNESS of a single source — d24 names supplier + component + relationship explicitly — NOT on corroboration count: the link appears in exactly one bundle (d24), so it must not be described as multiply attested. Confirms only on a direct supply link; a sanctions/entity-listing alone is NOT sufficient.

observable_relocation.expect: Rawalpindi confirmed(2021) -> Rahwali probable(single-pass, decoy cap) -> confirmed(2nd independent) -> supersedes retires Rawalpindi to STALE.

supersede_spoof.expect: D8 ⚔⚔ — without confidence-floor the spoof wrongly relocates; with floor it's held as candidate-supersede -> HITL. The counter-deception headline.

location_normalization.expect: Parse mixed surface notations (MGRS, DMS, decimal-degrees, port/facility alias, renamed-base alias, relative bearing-and-distance) and resolve to canonical place nodes. SAME-AS (must unify): d18 DMS (32°14′20″N 074°07′52″E) ≡ d19 'Rahwali Cantonment ~10 km NW of Gujranwala' -> pl_rahwali — THIS unification is load-bearing: the 2nd independent signal only corroborates the relocation once both resolve to one site. d17 MGRS + 'Nur Khan (fmr Chaklala)' -> pl_nurkhan (Chaklala alias WITHHELD from seed -> earned merge). d05 'Bin Qasim/PQ' -> pl_port_qasim. DISTINCT-FROM (must NOT merge): pl_port_qasim ≠ pl_karachi_port (~35 km, both 'Karachi'); the Karachi SAM site (pl_karachi_ad) ≠ either port. AMBIGUOUS: bare 'Karachi' (d02) -> metro, not a specific pad. PRECISION: pl_birm/pl_casic_2nd resolve at district level only (design authority needs city+district, not a grid). Coordinate provenance: base/port coords real+public; the Karachi pad is synthetic.

expect.known_limitation: d21's headline fact — that radar mode libraries, waveform parameters and calibration tables are configuration-controlled by a Chinese state technical-data authority — is NOT extracted today. The prose-claim form has no slot for a technical-data / configuration-control dependency (the tender form does), so the model has nowhere to put it and no techdata_authority instance is minted. Additionally d21 scopes that control to the HT-233 RADAR, whereas the ontology types design-authority-for as techdata_authority -> variant; a faithful record would need a component-scoped lane. Do NOT add a design-authority-for expectation here until the extractor actually emits it (see tmp/conv/EVAL-DATAC-sustainment-nodes-dropped.md).

asserts: an open-source site-recognition reference describes the CANONICAL overhead battery signature of the HQ-9 / HQ-9B (CASIC; HQ-9/P, HQ-9BE): a ~90-110 m circular 'petal' pad enclosed by a perimeter access road, ~6 TEL revetments in a radial fan around a central engagement-radar (HT-233) hardstand, canisterized TEL objects ~8-9 m long on a Taian/Wanshan 8x8 WS-series chassis; it explicitly frames a single-pass geometry match as CONSISTENT-WITH, not a positive ID (decoy-imitable) -- the crisp reference the imagery inference is judged against

NOT a satellite frame -> no relabel, no recycled-image (PDQ) collision with the real d07/d17b petals. expect.note: Leg (c) of the attribution triangle: the reference FINGERPRINT (B) the subject-blind imagery inference D matches against. To FIRE, the extracted site-geometry claim must be REACHABLE from var_hq9p/var_hq9be by the proposer's _fingerprint (variant + one hop). WIRING (INGEST): extraction today captures signature_geometry only on a SiteMention->basing_site (floating, unreachable) -- attach it to a variant-adjacent node instead. RECOMMENDED: observable_fingerprint on comp_tel_chassis (equips var_hq9p, 1 hop) and/or comp_ht233; alt: site_signature_geometry carried on the variant node. See tmp/conv DATA->INGEST note.

the LR-SAM <-> HQ-9/P <-> HQ-9P <-> FD-2000 alias chain (the tender's own nomenclature paragraph) + the S-300PMU / S-400 distinct-from traps
line-item component signals: TVM uplink/downlink test sets, erector-launcher chassis spares, engagement-radar cabin power modules, waveguide/RF assemblies, missile-canister environmental consumables

expect.note: d06 does NOT establish an interceptor stockpile and must not mint one. The tender states its requirement 'pertains solely to sustenance/repair-and-overhaul (R&O) support of equipment already fielded and does NOT constitute procurement of a new weapon system, launcher, missile round, or fire-control radar', and reiterates 'No new launcher units, radar sets, or missile rounds form part of this requirement.' Inferring magazine depth / days-of-supply / force posture from a maintenance contract is the fabrication the non-negotiable forbids. Also note the service mismatch: d06 is a PAF Air HQ tender naming no unit, so it cannot be attached to the Army unit_paad. SINGLE source -> anything it does support stays PROBABLE; a tender implies, never confirms.

image.real_source: HQ-9 battery nr Xi'an, China (34.62061,108.70656) — Esri World Imagery ~0.5m
image.caption: High-resolution, clear satellite imagery reveals a distinct, symmetrical, multi-lobed cleared area enclosed by a roughly circular perimeter track, situated amidst a grid of rectangular agricultural fields. The interior of this central feature is bisected by a straight north-south path and contains several dark, symmetrically arranged structural or landscaped elements alongside a few small, indistinct white objects. Adjacent to the west and south lies an organized compound featuring multiple rectangular buildings, paved courtyards, tree-lined roads, and two prominent blue rectangular features. The broader landscape is characterized by varied green and brown cultivated plots intersected by a network of dirt tracks and interspersed with isolated, small structural clusters.

image.caption: A grainy, low-light image captures a convoy of at least six wheeled, angular armored vehicles traveling in line along a wet, paved urban roadway illuminated by overhead streetlights. The lead vehicle, which displays motion blur indicating forward movement, is equipped with a roof-mounted turret manned by a visible individual. On the adjacent sidewalk, several bystanders in dark clothing are holding illuminated mobile devices, recording the passing vehicles, with a text overlay of "OCT 26, 23:47" visible in the lower right corner.

image.caption: The clear, daylight optical image centers on a sprawling, exceptionally dense urban settlement characterized by tightly packed, predominantly low-rise structures and an irregular street network. Bordering this dense zone to the northwest is an aviation facility featuring a primary runway, a parallel taxiway, and paved aprons, while the areas to the north exhibit lower-density, more geometrically planned structural grids. The southeastern quadrant transitions into agricultural land with patchwork fields of varying vegetation levels, separated from the dense urban area by a meandering linear depression consistent with a dry or low-flow drainage channel.

The central dirt area features a distinct geometric layout consisting of a large circular, multi-lobed ground pattern in the north and symmetrically aligned rectangular foundations or low structures extending southward along a central axis. The surrounding environment is characterized by tightly packed, multi-story rectangular buildings, a prominent running track to the west, and gridded multi-lane paved roadways carrying visible vehicular traffic.

The primary subject is a convoy of at least three multi-axle, camouflage-painted heavy transporter vehicles, each equipped with a rear-mounted cluster of four large cylindrical canisters. A dense crowd of civilian spectators is visible in the immediate foreground and midground grandstands, many utilizing mobile devices to capture the event, while a few individuals in military dress uniforms march on foot alongside the heavy vehicles.

image.caption: The image captures a rural, primarily forested area with several distinct clusters of buildings and infrastructure. In the upper right and lower left quadrants, there are complexes of rectangular structures, some with organized layouts resembling barracks or industrial facilities, connected by unpaved roads. A prominent, roughly circular unpaved track encloses several small, widely spaced rectangular buildings in the center of the image. The terrain includes multiple bodies of water of varying sizes, open fields with agricultural patterns, and a multi-lane highway running along the top left edge. The image is a clear, daytime optical satellite view.

asserts: analyst-report TEXT: a SINGLE 2025 satellite pass shows an HQ-9B site signature at Rahwali airfield near Gujranwala; the pass is geolocated in degrees-minutes-seconds as 32°14′20″N 074°07′52″E; single pass only, no repeat and no second collection discipline

expect.note: single-pass signature -> decoy_risk cap -> PROBABLE occupied@Rahwali

location.note: must resolve to the SAME node as d19's toponym+relative form for the 2nd signal to corroborate

image.real_source: S-400 site nr Feodosia, Crimea (45.01050,35.39810) — Esri World Imagery ~0.5m; dispersed/ambiguous, fits single-pass decoy-risk
image.caption: This moderate-resolution overhead imagery depicts an isolated facility situated in rugged, arid terrain characterized by steep ridges, exposed light-colored earth, and scattered patches of dark vegetation. At the center of the image, an unpaved ring road encloses a cleared area containing approximately 20 to 25 dark, elongated objects arranged in distinct linear arrays and small clusters. Southwest of this central loop is a dispersed complex of several rectangular structures, with the various elements of the site interconnected by a network of dirt tracks.

asserts: a discipline-independent, non-aligned signal (a repeat pass or an ELINT emitter-active fix) confirms the HQ-9B presence at the Rahwali Cantonment airfield, described in the report only as roughly 10 km NW of Gujranwala along the GT Road corridor (no grid reference given); clean decoy check

expect.note: 2nd independent signal lifts Rahwali to CONFIRMED; supersedes retires Rawalpindi -> STALE

location.surface_form: Rahwali Cantonment, ~10 km NW of Gujranwala
location.note: toponym+relative-bearing form; unifies with d18's DMS to the SAME node -> the corroboration is UNLOCKED by normalization

asserts: a fresh-dated (2025-06) SINGLE low-credibility post claims the HQ-9B unit has LEFT Rahwali for a different site

expect.note: WITHOUT supersede confidence-floor: wrongly relocates the unit. WITH floor: candidate-supersede -> contradiction -> HITL. Demo BOTH runs.
